questionHtml:
The label of each packet has a description which includes the phrase: “contains 226 g of coffee granules”.

Using your answer to part (a)(ii), briefly comment on the claim on the label.
markschemeHtml:
226 g lies within the confidence interval,          R1

so there is no evidence to dispute the claim on the label.          A1

 

Note: Do not award R0A1.

 

[2 marks]
